About Me

Professional Minecraft builder, architect, and SMP creator.

I build premium builds or farms with practical automation and player-ready design.

Hours Played

2.2K+

Builds Completed

73

Farms Designed

32

Worlds Transformed

4

Why should YOU choose me?

  • Fast builder - usually under a week, depends on size
  • Buyer-based offers, with some exceptions
  • I don't refuse build offers very often
  • I can build in any style, but prefer practical, polished designs

Dashboard

Owned player warps

pw mihu-farm

I manage the farm — harvesting and restocking as needed.

pw mihu-rentals

I handle rentals and player plots — follow posted rules.

pw mihu-shop

I run the shop — trade using signs or shop menus.

pw mihu-casino

I host mini-games and events — play fair and enjoy.

BlossomCraft SMP life

Active SMP experience, community builds, and server momentum.

Server events & markets

I'm doing regular giveaways, or player events (soon).

Collaborative districts

I design town centers with clear player paths and signage.

Community farms & systems

I build shared farms and systems for efficient survival play.
